playbook.intent: Project-heavy revenue mix to at least 50% recurring revenue and 40% less founder delivery time in 6 months.
playbook.scope: Move the agency from majority project-based revenue to majority retainer/productized recurring revenue. Outcome: at least 50% MRR-style recurring by month 6, founder time spent on delivery cut by 40%, customer concentration at or below 30% per logo. Exit artifact: revenue-mix audit + transition decision pack.

success-criteria.criterion: Revenue-mix audit complete (project vs retainer vs productized)
2 productized offers live with intake + delivery SOPs
Customer concentration at or below 30% per logo
Annual plan refreshed against new mix

stage.name: Audit the mix
stage.intent: Honest revenue + time + risk view today.

tasks.task: Tag last 12 months revenue by type
Map founder hours per revenue line

stage.decision-gate: Advance with baseline + transition target documented.

stage.name: Productize 2
stage.intent: Two productized offers to anchor recurring revenue.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once each productized offer has shipped 1 paid run.

stage.name: Convert + retain
stage.intent: Pull existing project clients into retainer / productized.

tasks.task: Send retainer pitch to top 10 accounts

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 3+ accounts converted to recurring.

stage.name: De-risk delivery
stage.intent: Founder cuts hands-on hours: contractor coverage + ops.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once founder delivery hours fall to or below 60% of baseline.

stage.name: Plan + decide
stage.intent: Annual plan against new mix; commit or roll back.

tasks.task: Run annual planning ritual against new mix

stage.decision-gate: Required: written decision. Continue, double down, or roll back to project-led.

extra.value: [Spinning up a SaaS product - separate playbook, Hiring full-time team to scale projects - out of scope]
[Steady project revenue across 12+ months, At least 2 recurring patterns identified in past work]

[Productizing without selling - landing pages without buyers do not move the mix, 'Cutting founder hours before delivery SOPs are tested - quality drops, churn rises', Treating month-3 revenue dip as failure - recurring revenue lags the work]
['Did I measure founder hours, not just revenue?', 'Are the productized offers actually selling, not just live?', 'Is concentration risk down or just hidden under retainers?']

{human: faion get-content agency-to-recurring-revenue-transition --format md, agent: faion get-content agency-to-recurring-revenue-transition --format context, json: faion get-content agency-to-recurring-revenue-transition --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
